creator: dschulz@gmail.com
text:
The attached patch updates the www/cherokee port from version 1.0.10 to 1.0.12.

Changes:
* files/patch-cherokee-admin-systemstats.py removed (upstream updated)
* as usual, pkg-plist, Makefile and distinfo modified.

to apply:

cd $PORTSDIR/www/cherokee && patch -p1 < /path/to/patch-1010-1012.diff.txt


Thanks!

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
